# Green Cylinder

This model creates a simple green cylinder, perfect as a basic 3D shape or building block for more complex designs.

## Parameters

- **cylinder_radius** (10): Controls the radius of the cylinder
- **cylinder_height** (20): Controls the height of the cylinder
- **$fn** (50): Controls the smoothness of the circular surfaces (higher values = smoother)

## Customization

You can easily customize this cylinder by adjusting:
- The **radius** to make it wider or narrower
- The **height** to make it taller or shorter
- The **$fn** value to adjust smoothness (use higher values like 100 for very smooth surfaces, or lower values like 20 for faster rendering)

## 3D Printing Notes

This cylinder is structurally sound for 3D printing:
- No overhangs or support structures needed
- Can be printed in any orientation
- Recommended to print standing upright for best surface finish
